items.title: Applying Best Simple System for Now for Software Design
items.summaryShort: Applying Best Simple System for Now for Software Design. Choosing between building up technical debt and missing delivery deadlines is a false dichotomy, Daniel Terhorst-North argued in his talk Best Simple System for Now.

items.summaryShort: Google Announces GKE Agent Sandbox and Hypercluster at Next '26, Positioning Kubernetes as AI Agent. Google announced GKE Agent Sandbox and hypercluster at Cloud Next '26.

items.title: LinkedIn Consolidates Hiring Data Pipelines to Power AI Driven Talent Systems
items.summaryShort: LinkedIn Consolidates Hiring Data Pipelines to Power AI Driven Talent Systems. LinkedIn introduced a unified integrations platform to standardize and reconcile hiring data across systems.

items.title: 2 days left: Get 50% off a second pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026
items.summaryShort: 2 days left: Get 50% off a second pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026. Two days left to save up to $410 on your pass, and get a second one at 50% off to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026.

items.title: China's Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets
items.summaryShort: China's Moonshot AI raises $2B at $20B valuation as demand for open-source AI skyrockets. Moonshot's annualized recurring revenue topped $200 million in April, driven by rapid growth in paid subscriptions and API usage.

items.title: Spotify wants to become the home for AI-generated personal audio
items.summaryShort: Spotify wants to become the home for AI-generated personal audio. Users will be able to create a podcast from Codex or Claude Code and import it to Spotify
